query: what is the capital of france

claims.text: The capital of France has been Paris since its liberation in 1944.

answerHtml:
The blue color of the sky is due to Rayleigh scattering, which sends more higher frequency shorter wavelength (blue) sunlight into the eye of observer than other frequencies wavelength. [Atmospheric optics]

The blueness of clear air in Earth's atmosphere is due to Rayleigh scattering by nitrogen and oxygen molecules.

When looking through clear air toward horizon, distant sunlight of all wavelengths (colors) will generally undergo Mie scattering from suspended particles.

Rayleigh scattering established the basic scientific model for the color of the sky. [Rayleigh scattering:History]

claims.text: The blue color of the sky is due to Rayleigh scattering, which sends more higher frequency shorter wavelength (blue) sunlight into the eye of observer than other frequencies wavelength.
The blueness of clear air in Earth's atmosphere is due to Rayleigh scattering by nitrogen and oxygen molecules.
When looking through clear air toward horizon, distant sunlight of all wavelengths (colors) will generally undergo Mie scattering from suspended particles.
Rayleigh scattering established the basic scientific model for the color of the sky.

claims.text: Credit for the invention telephone is frequently disputed with several individuals claiming credit.
Alexander Graham Bell was awarded first US patent for invention of telephone in 86.
Bell is most credited inventor of the practical telephone.
Antonio Meucci,9, developed voice-communication apparatus that several credit as first telephone.
